nodes.label: Home Scrolled — Mejora tu Concentración + Complementos del Ritual
nodes.description: Home screen scrolled view (no greeting visible) showing: focus duration pills row (pencil/edit, 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h), 'Mejora tu concentración' section with blocked apps list (Instagram-Red social, TikTok-Vídeos cortos, YouTube-Videos, X-Red social, Facebook-Red social) each with toggle, an '+ Agregar apps' CTA. Below: 'Complementos del ritual' section with 'Editar' button and 6 ritual complement cards in 2-column grid: Meditar (10 min), Leer (20 pp), Estudiar (45 min), Respirar (5 min), Gratitud (3 veces), Entrenar (30 min).

nodes.label: Complementos del Ritual — 2-Column Card Grid
nodes.description: Two-column grid of 'Complementos del ritual' cards. Each card shows an icon (activity type), card name and quantity/duration. Section header includes 'Editar' text button. Cards are rounded rectangles in dark glass style. Layout: 6 cards, 3 rows of 2. Categories span mindfulness (Meditar, Respirar, Gratitud), learning (Leer, Estudiar), and fitness (Entrenar).

nodes.label: Mejora tu Concentración — App Blocking Controls
nodes.description: Section 'Mejora tu concentración' with subtitle 'Estas apps no te interrumpirán durante el enfoque'. Lists apps with their category labels and toggle switches: Instagram (Red social), TikTok (Vídeos cortos), YouTube (Videos), X (Red social), Facebook (Red social). Bottom CTA '+ Agregar apps' for adding more. Toggles are dark/off by default, user can enable blocking per app.
